comments: Approved. git show --stat --name-only 56518f2 matches the execution result artifact: implementation change is strictly limited to src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, with only the allowed task artifacts also changed. The index.ts patch hardens path resolution by deriving projectRoot from process.env.PROJECT_ROOT || process.cwd() and resolving contract, dispatch, and iteration-state paths from that base. src/mcp-server/src/test-client.ts was not modified, and no legacy Python scripts were deleted.
